title: Gem Upgrades
description: Adds 6 Geode structures each one with a gem type you can upgrade tools/equipment (and rings!) with, lets you mix between Overworld Gems and Nether Gems so each item can have max 2 gems.
body:
*** [Remember to download the **REQUIRED** **resourcepack**] ***
![All features](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3a8a765f67c8ca6346f7b1b7d8ae3bbce1ed346c.png)

Adds 3 Overworld Geodes and 3 Nether Geodes, both generating close to lava or below.
Adds 3 Overworld Gems and 3 Nether Gems
Adds 6 Gem Crystals and 6 Gem Blocks
Adds 3 Item Recipes: Overworld Gem Fuser, Nether Gem Fuser, Gem Golden Ring

Inside these Geodes you can find a type of Gem:
- Overworld Gems: Ruby - Jade - Sapphire
- Nether Gems: Opal - Topaz - Onyx

You can infuse your tools/equipment/rings with a gem by dropping it in the ground along your item and the required Gem Fuser.

An Item can be Infused with both a Overworld and a Nether Gem!
![Sword with gem upgrades](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6ccdefd65b9f0da6253e0465caa2a424f1c449a2.png)

Recipes added: (you will unlock them automatically)
![crafting overworld fuser](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4920fa16940b0a4ced78436dba72eb25c0aa0abf.png)
![crafting nether fuser](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7dfb34420f9aa436225dc0f56f0da58a986f7ea2.png)
![Golden Gem Ring recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e4be763ca04ea880d19e833caa45c2bd25c68869.png)
